creator: admin@lissyara.su
text:
Cannot compile krss on 6.2 and 8.0
=============
===>  Building for krss-2.6_6
cd . && gmake -f admin/Makefile.common configure.in ;
gmake[1]: Entering directory `/tmp/ports/usr/ports/deskutils/krss/work/krss-2.6'
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/tmp/ports/usr/ports/deskutils/krss/work/krss-2.6'
cd . && aclocal
acinclude.m4:36: warning: underquoted definition of AC_FIND_FILE
acinclude.m4:36:   run info '(automake)Extending aclocal'
acinclude.m4:36:   or see http://sources.redhat.com/automake/automake.html#Extending-aclocal
acinclude.m4:2536: the serial number must appear before any macro definition
acinclude.m4:2581: the serial number must appear before any macro definition
acinclude.m4:2626: the serial number must appear before any macro definition
acinclude.m4:4079: the serial number must appear before any macro definition
acinclude.m4:662: error: m4_defn: undefined macro: _m4_divert_diversion
acinclude.m4:662: the top level
autom4te-2.61: /usr/local/bin/gm4 failed with exit status: 1
aclocal-1.10: autom4te failed with exit status: 1
gmake: *** [aclocal.m4] Ошибка 1
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/deskutils/krss.

How-To-Repeat: always
